mapper.sql: select r.id, r.template_id, r.sender_id, r.receiver_id, r.title, r.content, r.status, r.send_time, r.recall_time, su.nick_name as sender_name, ru.nick_name as receiver_name, t.template_name from crm_message_record r left join sys_user su on r.sender_id = su.user_id left join sys_user ru on r.receiver_id = ru.user_id left join crm_message_template t on r.template_id = t.id
mapper.select: select count(1) from crm_message_record where receiver_id = #{receiverId} and status = '0'
mapper.update: update crm_message_record set status = '2' where id = #{id} and receiver_id = #{receiverId} and status = '0'
